qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ07_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, LIQ07_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@liq} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo ={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@CODE} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ07_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, LIQ07_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@liq} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:define.declare: <helper-mess liq="1" code="2" id="4" text="RIZZO, JUAN PABLO" />
qry:define.name: X2C

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ07_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, LIQ07_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@liq} AND LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq = {#SOURCE:helper-mess/@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
